summary:
Function: import sys
from cart import Cart
from catalog import Catalog
from pricing import PricingEngine
from formatter import Formatter

def main(cart_file: str):
    catalog = Catalog()
    pricing_engine = PricingEngine(catalog)
    cart = Cart(catalog)
    cart.load_cart(cart_file)
    pricing_engine.apply_discounts(cart)
    formatter = Formatter(cart, pricing_engine)
    formatter.print_receipt()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main(sys.argv[1])
